summary: Completed full backend and frontend testing of KUN Workspace Arabic RTL website. All 8 backend API tests passed. Key UI flows (homepage, spaces, contact, pod) all working correctly. One minor navigation issue identified.

ui_bugs.issue: Navigation only includes 4 links (/, /services, /about, /contact). Missing links for /spaces, /business, and /pod pages. Users cannot navigate to these pages from the navbar.
Service type dropdown (shadcn Select) was not interactable via standard form submission test - form validation correctly blocks submission without it. This is expected behavior.

issues: Google Map iframe is present but rendering as a small strip at the bottom - may need height adjustment

action_items: Add /spaces, /business, /pod navigation links to Navbar.jsx navLinks array
Verify Google Map iframe has proper height styling on contact page
critical_code_review_comments: Navbar is missing links to /spaces, /business, /pod - these pages exist and render correctly but are not reachable via navigation
server.py CORSMiddleware should be added BEFORE routers for correct middleware ordering
seed_data_creation: None - using hardcoded mock data in server.py
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend APIs passing (100%). Homepage, Spaces, Contact, Pod, About pages all render correctly in Arabic RTL. Desk booking dialog opens correctly. Office availability badges and disabled buttons working. WhatsApp link correct (wa.me/966535420969). Main issue: Navbar missing links for /spaces, /business, /pod pages.
